series_metadata.series_description: This retention schedule consists of education course rosters and related documents for continuing education courses.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: Paper records may be imaged and indexed computer in a machine readable format. Upon confirmation that paper copy was imaged and indexed properly ; Electronic: Any images on computer are be retained six years from date of receipt by Division and ; Microform: Any images in microform are be retained six years from date of receipt by Division and
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Erase ; Microform: Recycle
